weekly picks (Apr 4 week 2026)

Posted on April 27, 2026 in 2026apr,  Daily t.me,  adsabs,  g scholar

A WordCloud of 2026 Apr 4th week collection

===This week’s pick===

  • Score :
Unfold/Fold

04/27

  1. 2604.21973v1 Field-driven phases in a three-dimensional twisted Kitaev model for CoNb$_2$O$_6$: Interplay of frustration and spin-orbit coupling (arXiv)

  2. 2604.21978v1 Beyond Variational Bias: Resolving Intertwined Orders in the Hubbard Model (arXiv)

  3. 2604.21985v1 Anisotropy of spin waves in the field-polarized phase of Fe-doped MnSi (arXiv)

  4. 2604.21992v1 Floquet mobility edges and transport in a periodically driven generalized Aubry-Andr'e model (arXiv)

  5. 2604.22044v1 Spin-polarized Energy Density Method from Spin-Density Functional Theory (arXiv)

  6. 2604.22112v1 Enhanced Tantalum Superconducting Resonator Performance via All-Surface Organic Monolayer Passivation (arXiv)

  7. 2604.22131v1 Extended Haldane Model in The Dice Lattice: Multiple Flat-Band-Induced topological Transitions Revealed (arXiv)

  8. 2604.22151v1 Long-Range Order in Coupled $D$-dimensional Kuramoto Oscillators (arXiv)

  9. 2604.22155v1 Microscopic Modeling of Surface Roughness Scattering in Inversion Layers of MOSFETs Based on Ando’s Linear Model (arXiv)

  10. 2604.22214v1 Non-volatile superconducting tunnelling magnetoresistance memory enabled by exchange-field gap engineering (arXiv)

  11. 2604.22218v1 Uncovering long-lived relaxation channel and exciton-phonon coupling in \textrm{Ta\textsubscript{2}NiSe\textsubscript{5}} via non-degenerate pump-probe spectroscopy (arXiv)

  12. 2604.22223v1 QAssemble: A Pure Python Package for Quantum Many-Body Theory (arXiv)

  13. 2604.22300v1 Theoretical prediction of strong-coupling superconductivity in a hypothetical NaAlH3 phase at ambient pressure (arXiv)

  14. 2604.22329v1 The antiferromagnetic Chern insulator phase in the Kane-Mele-Hubbard model (arXiv)

  15. 2604.22342v1 The quantum harmonic oscillator in a dissipative bath of anyon pairs (arXiv)

  16. 2604.22343v1 Dynamic Moir'e Potentials and Robust Wigner Crystallization in Large-Scale Twisted Transition Metal Dichalcogenides (arXiv)

  17. 2604.22346v1 Electric-Field Control of Quantum Tunneling Regimes in Focused He-Ion-Beam-Irradiated Oxide Interfaces (arXiv)

  18. 2604.22353v1 Spiral, target, stripe, and disordered waves in active six-state Potts models (arXiv)

  19. 2604.22393v1 Nature of point defects in bulk hexagonal diamond (arXiv)

  20. 2604.22396v1 Surface coating induced lubrication in flowing granular materials (arXiv)

  21. 2604.22398v1 Accurate Nanoscale Mapping of Electric Fields across Random Grain Boundaries in Polycrystalline Oxides Using Precession-Assisted 4D-STEM (arXiv)

  22. 2604.22434v1 The influence of implantation conditions on dopant activation in Al-implanted 4H-SiC: A MD study applying an Al potential fitted to DFT barriers (arXiv)

  23. 2604.22444v1 Comparative Silane Surface Functionalization Strategies for Enhanced Bloch Surface Wave Biosensing of Anti-SARS-CoV-2 Antibodies (arXiv)

  24. 2604.22448v1 Electrostatic-Elastic Softening and Ultraviolet Instability Driven by Non-DLVO Interactions in Charged Colloidal Crystals (arXiv)

  25. 2604.22484v1 Classifying magnons in itinerant ferromagnets from linear response TDDFT: Fe, Ni and Co revisited (arXiv)

  26. 2604.22523v1 Magnetoelastic Waves in Ferromagnetic Thin Films Mediated by Dipolar Interactions (arXiv)

  27. 2604.22536v1 Mean-Field Theory for the Three-State Active Lattice Gas Model (arXiv)

  28. 2604.22544v1 Micromorphic effects in an octet truss lattice (arXiv)

  29. 2604.22547v1 Valley enhanced Rabi frequency in n-type planar Silicon-MOS quantum dot (arXiv)

  30. 2604.22553v1 Corner Majorana states in semi-Dirac (arXiv)

  31. 2604.22561v1 Influence of Ni Doping on the Structural, Morphological, Optical, and Electrical Properties of Nanocrystalline Cd1-xMnxS Thin Films (arXiv)

  32. 2604.22574v1 Pulse Shaping to Mitigate the Impact of Device Imperfections in Field-Free Switching Using Combined Spin-Orbit and Spin-Transfer Torques (arXiv)

  33. 2604.22600v1 Anomalous Mean-Squared Displacement in Quantum Active Matter from a Wigner Phase-Space Framework (arXiv)

  34. 2604.22614v1 Accurate calculation of Wannier centers, position matrix, and composite operators using translationally equivariant and higher-order finite differences (arXiv)

  35. 2604.22628v1 Exact relations between the density-density correlators of states in a spin multiplet (arXiv)

  36. 2604.22650v1 Strain engineering of Andreev spin qubits in Germanium (arXiv)

  37. 2604.22687v1 Alterations in Conformations of Poly(3-hexylthiophene) on Au(111) Induced by Annealing (arXiv)

  38. 2604.22743v1 Thermometry for a Kagome Lattice Dipolar Rydberg Simulator (arXiv)

  39. 2604.22376v1 No-Go Theorem for Quantum Heat Engines Powered Purely by Quantum Measurements in the Steady Regime (arXiv)

  40. 2604.22500v1 Quantum limits on squeezing (arXiv)

  41. 2604.22521v1 Decohered color code and emerging mixed toric code by anyon proliferation: Topological entanglement negativity perspective (arXiv)

  42. 2604.22593v1 Stability Thresholds for Gravitationally Induced Entanglement in Shielded Setups (arXiv)

  43. 2604.22696v1 Pressure-Temperature Phase Diagram and $\lambda$-Transition in Liquid Sulfur (arXiv)
